# External Archive Files

The trimmed GitHub repository assumes the heavy inputs and intermediate products live outside GitHub.

## Raw or yearly inputs

- `GAIA_frac_025_2000.parquet` through `GAIA_frac_025_2024.parquet`
- `ERA5_hourly_T_Td_UNION_2000.parquet` through `ERA5_hourly_T_Td_UNION_2024.parquet`

## Large derived outputs worth archiving

- `GAIA_025_urban_status_tau015_2000_2024.parquet`
- `GAIA_025_union_nodes_tau015_2000_2024.parquet`
- `ERA5_hotnight_events_T_Tw_dyn_2000_2024_tau015.parquet`
- `ERA5_coldnight_events_T_Tw_dyn_2000_2024_tau015.parquet`
- `ECA_edges_dyn_T2_a0.005_K3_tau015.parquet`
- `ECA_edges_SEESAW_T2_a0.005_K3_tau015.parquet`
- `ECA_nodes_used_T2_tau015.parquet`

If you publish these large files in Zenodo, Figshare, or OSF, link that archive from the manuscript data and code availability statements.
